title: Maha Sarakham Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Maha Sarakham with a Z-Score of +3.34. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Maha Sarakham has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.7 GG, indicating a significant energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 78% and the wind speed is at 11.5 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
